subcodes.first_line: He is the Mighty, the Wondrous! In the darkness of the earth, after the souls had turned away, He was even as the sun from the horizon of spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو العزیز البدیع فی ظلمه الارض بعد اعراض النفوس کان بمثل الشمس عن افق الروح
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
